requirement.description: If multiple warning conditions are active simultaneously, the system shall transmit all active warnings together in the same update to the instrument cluster.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify Overspeed and Door-Open warnings are transmitted together in the same CAN frame.
test_cases.expected_result: OverspeedWarn = 1 and DoorOpenWarn = 1 present together in the same frame

test_cases.test_objective: Verify Overspeed and High-Temperature warnings are transmitted together.
test_cases.expected_result: OverspeedWarn = 1 and HighTempWarn = 1 in the same update

test_cases.test_objective: Verify Door-Open and High-Temperature warnings are transmitted together.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorOpenWarn = 1 and HighTempWarn = 1 in the same update

test_cases.test_objective: Verify Overspeed, Door-Open, and High-Temperature warnings are transmitted together simultaneously.
test_cases.expected_result: OverspeedWarn = 1, DoorOpenWarn = 1, HighTempWarn = 1 in the same CAN frame

test_cases.test_objective: Verify warnings are not split across multiple frames.
test_steps: Activate two or more warning conditions
Verify all active bits appear in each frame
test_cases.expected_result: All active warnings appear within one single Gateway_Warnings message

test_cases.test_objective: Verify no partial transmission when multiple warnings activate at the same time.
test_steps: Trigger multiple conditions at same instant
test_cases.expected_result: No warning bit missing when multiple conditions become true simultaneously
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s14_006(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_GATEWAY_WARNINGS, CAPTURE_DURATION)
    first = msgs[0]
    bits = [decode_overspeed_warn(first), decode_door_open_warn(first), decode_high_temp_warn(first)]
    assert any(bits)
